sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ يُوسُفُ أَنْ يُشَاهِدَ مُبَارَاةَ كُرَةِ الْقَدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je htio gledati fudbalsku utakmicu.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf wanted to watch a football match.

sentences.translation: Tražio je na internetu i pronašao je.
sentences.translationEn: He searched for it on the internet and found it.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je pretraživač i počeo gledati.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the browser and started watching.

sentences.translation: Slika je bila jasna a zvuk dobar.
sentences.translationEn: The picture was clear and the sound was good.
